_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs) for new data processing activities and AI systems.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.628), RC-S-004 (RC, cosine: 0.584).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.662). Shared vocabulary: [assessments, impact, privacy]. DCWF-only terms [knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, conducting, data, dpias, new] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.897, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.053 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of Privacy Impact Assessments." and "Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.681 ≈ STS 0.662 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [assessments, impact, privacy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.8%. Shared tokens: [assessments, impact, privacy]. DCWF-only: [knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, conducting, data, dpias, new].
